summary: The presence of bearish factors such as price below the 20-day moving average and MACD below its signal line outweighs the bullish factors, resulting in a bearish technical view.
bullish_factors: The 12-day EMA is above the 26-day EMA, supporting positive momentum.
The stock has positive 5-day return momentum.
The stock has positive 20-day return momentum.
bearish_factors: Price is below the 20-day moving average.
The 20-day moving average is below the 50-day moving average.
MACD is below its signal line, indicating weakening momentum.
